name: defold-codex-toolkit
description: Defold-specific Codex workflow toolkit for build, UI/input, debugging, and project conventions.

interface.longDescription: Provides narrowly scoped Defold workflow skills for builds, GUI and input work, debugging, and project convention checks in Codex-driven repositories.
defaultPrompt: Audit this Defold input flow for focus and modal routing bugs
Check whether this Defold build or bundle setup matches the local project
Review this Defold project structure before editing gameplay or GUI code
